description:
Court records. Location: Fustat. Dating: c.1082–94 CE, as the reshut clause of the second document invokes David b. Daniel [b. ʿAzarya]. The fragment includes the end of one document and beginning of another one. 

For the first record see PGPID 34325.

The second record involves Thābit b. Yūsuf known as Ḥammār, Khibāʾ bt. Menashshe the wife of Yefet, and a sum of 15 dinars. See also ENA NS I.11 (PGPID 11204).
description_he: רישומי בית דין מפוסטאט, בערך 1082-1094 לסה"נ, כולל מסמך הנוגע לתאבת בן יוסף הנקרא חמאר, ח'יבא בת מנשה אשת יפת, וסכום של 15 דינרים
